title: Subscription Service
description: Service that notifies subscribers of data updates.

definitions.definition: Service that notifies subscribers of data updates.
definitions.notes: This service allows users to sign up or subscribe to data update notifications at a particular frequency. A user should expect a subscription acknowledgement as an initial response, and when new data is available on S3/EFS or Glacier for the data subscribed, a message is communicated to the user through e-mail, RSS feed, JSON feed, etc. This may require an order processor.
